response.original_title: All Aboard: America’s Best Model Trains
response.overview: Featuring both classic antique and modern-era Lionel® and American Flyer® trains, this full-steam, high action video presentation brings you an experts-eye view of the most amazing model train layouts from across the country.  We're talking about the biggest, wildest, most incredibly realistic and detailed model railroading layouts you've ever seen. Complete multi-level, even multi-room creations with operating sawmills, dairies, coal loaders, roundhouses, and more! Children will sit, fascinated, and watch these amazing railroads, but adults will find them just as enticing. It seems everybody loves toy trains, whether you had one as a child, or just wished you did.  Produced by Tom McComas, author of the definitive, six-volume Lionel® Collector's Guide and History and the most respected expert on toy trains in America, this is a train lovers dream come true! So, punch your ticket and climb on board for a railroad journey you'll never forget!
response.title: All Aboard: America’s Best Model Trains
